zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugo de Talemasche於1070年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，他的父親Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache25歲，母親Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford23歲。他於1089年與Matilde de Saint-John在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1154年在英國奧可福爾斯托克 打馬字享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugo de Talemasche于1070年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾时，他的父亲Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache25岁，母亲Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford23岁。他于1089年与Matilde de Saint-John在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1154年在英国奧可福爾斯托克 打馬字享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of   Hugh  , used throughout the Middle Ages in official documents, and now enjoying a revival as a given name.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugo de Talemasche was born in 1070, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache, was 25 and his mother, Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford, was 23. He married Matilde de Saint-John in 1089, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1154, in Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugo de Talemasche est né en 1070, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Matilde de Saint-John en 1089, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1154, à Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugo de Talemasche 1070 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache 25 und seine Mutter Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford 23. Er hat 1089 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Matilde de Saint-John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1154 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugo de Talemasche è nato il nel 1070 nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Matilde de Saint-John nel 1089, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1154, nel Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugo de Talemascheが1070年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemacheは25歳，母Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samfordは23歳であった。1089年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでMatilde de Saint-Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1154年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストク タルマッジで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugo de Talemasche(이)가 1070년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Matilde de Saint-John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1154년 영국 스퍼드실르 스토크 탤마지에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugo de Talemasche nasceu em 1070, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilde de Saint-John em 1089, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1154, em Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugo de Talemasche родился в 1070 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilde de Saint-John в 1089 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1154 г. в местности сток талмадж, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

Se casó con Matilde de Saint-John en 1089, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1154, en Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
